titleStmt.title: SII 36.216: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 216. (A.R. No. 216 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: Māmbākkiḻāṉ installed an image of Kshētrapālap Piḷḷaiyār in the temple of Tiruvallidāyamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār at Tiruvallidāyam of Ambattūrnāḍu, in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, and gifted 5 aṉṟāḍu-naṟ-paḻaṅkācu for providing one twilight lamp (chandhi viḷakku) and food offerings to the deity. The money was received by the śiva-brāhmaṇas, who agreed to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattup puḻaṟ koṭṭattampattūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvalli tāyamu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇar bhāradvāji nityānan=ta bhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum kāśyapaṉ kulottuṅka bhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ivvaṉaivomum Upaiyaṅkoṇṭapaṭi pāṭiyil
Uṭaiyāṉ māmpākkiḻāṉ perumāḷ Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilukku Ivar Eḻun=taruḷuvitta kṣetrabhālapiḷḷaiyāṟku Iṭṭa cantiviḷakku 1 m Iṭṭu tiruñāṉa camantaṉāle nāḻi Ariciyum kaṟiyum Amutu
ceyvittuk koḷḷak kaṭavomāka Ivar pakkal nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu 5 kkum Ippiḷyāṟku Ippaṭi Upaiyam candrādityavarai celuttak kaṭavom Ikkoyiṟ
tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyārom Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 36.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
